penalties.description: Suture placement was off target by approximately 2 mm from one marked site.
A required hand exchange was clearly missed between the first and second throws.

reasoning: All phases were clearly visible with a complete sequence of throws and final suture cut. Deviations and hand switch were verified without obstruction.
technique_summary: All phases were clearly visible with a complete sequence of throws and final suture cut. Deviations and hand switch were verified without obstruction.
